description_long: This is a compact MIDI keyboard controller with a dark gray chassis and a set of 25 piano-style keys, predominantly white with black accidentals. The top panel features a row of eight colorful, rectangular pads, likely for triggering samples or drum sounds, and several rotary knobs for parameter control. To the left, there are two sliders and a red power button, as well as pitch and modulation wheels. The right side of the panel is populated with various small buttons and icons, suggesting additional control functions. The overall design is sleek and modern, with a mix of matte and slightly glossy surfaces. This keyboard is typically used for music production and performance, often connected to computers or synthesizers.
description: A compact MIDI keyboard controller with 25 keys, colorful pads, rotary knobs, sliders, and various control buttons in a sleek, modern design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full set of piano keys, colorful pads, rotary knobs, and control buttons clearly.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlighting the pitch and modulation wheels, sliders, and the red power button.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the keys, the tops of the pads and knobs, and the control buttons.
description_view_3: Right-side view focusing on the control buttons, colorful pads, and the edge of the keybed.
